utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Specifies physical and mental health insurance with named plans and costs, plus a total monthly cost. Meets requirement.
- property_coverage: Specifies home/contents insurance with a named plan and monthly cost, plus total monthly cost. Meets requirement.
- travel_coverage: Specifies travel insurance items with costs and a total monthly cost. Although broken into components (primary_travel, travel_assistance, medical_network), it still provides travel insurance with costs. Meets requirement.
- additional_services: Provides enhancement services with individual costs and a total monthly cost; also includes a one-time fee. Meets requirement.
- total_budget: Provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown, previous costs, savings, one-time fee, effective date, and payment schedule. Meets requirement.
Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with costs and relevant details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I identified each item named in the final coverage plan and matched it to the corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. For primary health, the plan includes PrimeCare Premium Plan for physical health and PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health) which both exist with rating 10. For property, the plan includes PrimeHome Premium Coverage which has rating 10. For travel, the plan lists PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 10), 24/7 Travel Assistance (rating 10), and Premium Medical Network (rating 10). In additional services, Business Travel Support (rating 10), Emergency Mental Health Care (rating 8), Wellness Programs (rating 10), Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10), and Claims Advocacy Service (rating 9) all match ground-truth items.
